title: Blast Golem
description: this pack adds a custom model for the golem
body:
welcome again 

what the pack adds:  a custom model for the iron golem with the theme of the blast furnace

why do you want to download this pack: 
This golem variant has a different appearance with custom textures, the blast furnace golem brings a distinct industrial charm to the game. Immerse yourself in a world where these specialized golems protect and assist in a way that resonates with the theme of metallurgy and heat. Elevate your gameplay with this creative and engaging alteration to the Minecraft universe.

REQUIRES: OPTIFINE
